title: The Spirits’ Book

subtitle: The moral teachings of Jesus explained through the Spiritist doctrine.

title: Genesis
subtitle: Miracles and predictions according to Spiritism; science and faith reconciled.

subtitle: Essays and writings published after Kardec’s death.

subtitle: A concise introduction to the doctrine for newcomers and skeptics.

subtitle: A short summary edition of the introduction.

title: Spiritism in Its Simplest Expression
subtitle: A brief overview of Spiritism’s history and principles.

subtitle: An early practical manual on mediumistic phenomena.
